Broker Introduction
ESOP Transaction Stewardship — Partnership Overview

§ 01Who We Are

Dear {{brokerName}},

Forhemit Transition Stewardship is a transaction stewardship firm that facilitates employee ownership transitions for lower-middle-market companies. We coordinate the ESOP deal team, manage the process timeline, prepare lender and trustee packages, and provide post-close operational stewardship.

We are writing to introduce ourselves and explore a referral partnership. Forhemit works with business brokers who encounter clients exploring exit options — and for the right company, an ESOP can be the best outcome for all parties.

What we are NOT: Forhemit is not a buyer, broker, attorney, financial advisor, or ERISA fiduciary. We do not compete for deals — we help close them. Our fee is paid by the operating company, not from the broker's commission.
§ 02When to Refer to Forhemit

An ESOP may be the right path when the seller's company has:

A.Stable, recurring revenue. $5M+ annual revenue with predictable cash flow. ESOPs work best for companies with durable earnings, not project-based or volatile businesses.
B.Strong EBITDA. $1.5M+ TTM EBITDA (QofE-normalized). This is the floor for SBA 7(a) financing viability.
C.Owner continuity interest. The seller wants to preserve the company's legacy, retain employees, and stay involved post-close (even if only for a transition period).
D.No obvious strategic buyer. The seller has explored traditional M&A and either the valuations are below expectations or the fit isn't right.
E.C-Corp or convertible entity. LLCs and S-Corps can convert to C-Corps for the ESOP, but the seller needs to understand the tax implications (we handle this).
§ 03How the Referral Works
1.You introduce the seller to Forhemit. A warm email introduction is all we need. We handle the rest — deal screener, pre-flight checklist, engagement letter, and full transaction management.
2.We send you the deal screener response. Within 48 hours, Forhemit will send you and the seller a structured assessment: does this deal fit the ESOP criteria, and if so, what does the path look like?
3.Your commission is protected. Forhemit does not adjust, share, defer, or appear as a line item affecting broker commission. The full agreed-upon commission is paid at closing per the listing agreement.
4.Referral fee available. If you are not the listing broker but made the referral, Forhemit can facilitate a referral fee arrangement. Details are set forth in a separate Referral Fee Agreement.
§ 04The ESOP Advantage for Sellers

Why sellers choose ESOPs over traditional M&A:

A.Fair market value. ESOP appraisals are conducted by independent, ASA-accredited firms. The FMV is often competitive with — or exceeds — strategic buyer offers for the right company.
B.§1042 tax deferral. Sellers of C-Corp stock to an ESOP can defer 100% of capital gains tax by reinrolling proceeds into Qualified Replacement Securities. This can save millions in taxes.
C.Legacy preservation. The company stays independent. No competitor acquisition, no PE strip-mining, no layoffs. The employees who built the company become its owners.
D.Flexible timeline. The 120-day process is structured but not rushed. The seller has clear gates and decision points throughout.
§ 05What We Send You

For each referred deal, Forhemit provides the broker with:

01Deal screener response. Structured assessment of ESOP viability within 48 hours of receiving company information.
02Weekly status updates. During the transaction, brokers receive headline-only status updates at each gate milestone.
03Closing commission confirmation. Formal confirmation of commission amount and wire timing on closing day.
04Marketing materials. ESOP cost reference cards, two-track cost analyses, and other materials you can share with sellers to introduce the ESOP concept.
§ 06Next Steps

If you have a seller who may be a fit for an ESOP, the process is simple:

A.Send a warm introduction. Email deals@forhemit.com with the seller's name, company, and basic financials (revenue, EBITDA, industry). CC the seller if appropriate.
B.We respond within 48 hours. The seller receives a structured deal screener response. You receive a copy.
C.No commitment required. The deal screener is free. The seller can proceed or walk away at any point before signing the Pre-Flight Checklist.
Confidentiality: All information shared with Forhemit is treated as confidential. We will not contact the seller directly without a broker introduction, and we will not share deal information with any third party without authorization.
§ 07Contact
deals@forhemit.com
forhemit.com

We look forward to working with you.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship

California Public Benefit Corporation
